docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $124.64 FILED BY CARTRIDGE EXPRESS AS TO DEFENDANT SUENDERMANN KERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
